system_prompt:
U# Main topic

You are a professional text coder of TikTok video transcripts about news, politics & societal issues. Your task is to determine whether the given transcript contains group signaling rehtoric, better known as Alienation, or whether it contains some other type of language.
follow the category definitions below strictly.

{categories}

categories.Alienation: Alienates or implies that another individual or group doesn't belong or fit in, uses us vs. them framing
categories.Other: The transcript does not contain rhetoric to do with Alienation

_comment: If "labels" is omitted, will use the options themselves as responses (recommended only if the category names are single words). Under "examples", "target_index" is always the integer index of the correct choice in the list, 0-based.
